masking_hierarchy.masking_hierarchy_rule: Only flag masking as critical when competing elements occupy the same depth layer and perceptual role. Allow controlled overlap when one element is midground/background or classified as felt.
masking_hierarchy.bad_masking: Two elements at the same or competing depth layers fight for the same perceptual role.
masking_hierarchy.good_masking: An element intentionally blends into the song fabric (a pad behind the vocal, room tone filling low-mid body).
bad_examples: lead vocal and lead guitar both forward in 1-4 kHz
piano and vocal both dense in 300 Hz-1.5 kHz
stereo loop and guitars both full-width in the chorus
synth pad and vocal both foreground and bright
good_examples: pad overlapping vocal range but sitting behind the vocal
room tone filling low-mid emotional body
texture loop supporting chorus density without demanding attention
background percussion adding movement without being identifiable
